37.reason: [This incorrectly converts non-letter characters (like digits, punctuation) to lowercase by adding 32. Only uppercase letters should be converted. Also, characters like space or newline become invalid when +32 is applied.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This incorrectly converts non-letter characters (like digits, punctuation) to lowercase by adding 32. Only uppercase letters should be converted. Also, characters like space or newline become invalid when +32 is applied.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [This condition incorrectly converts non-lowercase characters (including digits, punctuation, etc.) to lowercase by adding 32, which is only valid for uppercase letters A-Z. It should only convert 'A'-'Z'.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition `ch<'a'` incorrectly assumes all non-lowercase letters should be lowercased. It will convert digits, punctuation, etc., into invalid characters (e.g., '0'+32 = '@'). Only uppercase letters (A-Z) should be converted to lowercase. This leads to non-letter characters being treated as part of words later.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [This incorrectly converts non-lowercase characters (including digits, punctuation, etc.) to lowercase by adding 32. Only uppercase letters should be converted.]
